# Article Template

**File:** `templates/article.json`

The article template displays a single blog post with content, author info, comments, and related articles.

## Features

- ✅ Full article content
- ✅ Author information
- ✅ Publish date
- ✅ Social sharing
- ✅ Comments section (Shopify or Disqus)
- ✅ Related articles
- ✅ Tags
- ✅ Next/Previous article navigation

## Sections Used

- `main-article` - Main article content
- `blog-sidebar` - Sidebar with recent posts, tags
- `related-articles` - Related blog posts
